historical_g0_retained.scope: one static calendar, one cell rho90_share90, one burned tape 7430001
historical_g0_retained.result: bit-exact for the three checked fields

defects_found_before_g1: contract froze G1 at phi=1 but implementation used phi=4
implementation ignored the populated RiskEvent.affected_ops field and therefore emitted an empty operation map
G1 did not enforce the preregistered exact affected-operation map
G0 used one seed and a static calendar rather than the frozen controller and comparator family
